sentences.target: Der Professor erklärt die Aufgabe ganz ruhig.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ pʁoˈfɛsoːɐ̯ ɛʁˈklɛːʁt diː ˈaʊ̯fˌɡaːbə ɡants ˈʁuːɪç./

translations.de: Der Professor erklärt die Aufgabe ganz ruhig.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ pʁoˈfɛsoːɐ̯ ɛʁˈklɛːʁt diː ˈaʊ̯fˌɡaːbə ɡants ˈʁuːɪç./
translations.en: The professor explains the assignment calmly.
translations.es: El profesor explica la tarea con calma.
translations.fr: Le professeur explique le devoir calmement.
translations.it: Il professore spiega il compito con calma.
translations.yue: 教授好冷靜咁講解功課。
translations.pt: O professor explica a tarefa com calma.
translations.vi: Giáo sư giải thích bài tập một cách bình tĩnh.
translations.nl: De professor legt de opdracht rustig uit.
translations.hu: A professzor nyugodtan elmagyarázza a feladatot.
translations.hi: प्रोफेसर शांति से असाइनमेंट समझाते हैं।
translations.el: Ο καθηγητής εξηγεί την εργασία ήρεμα.
translations.ja: 教授は課題を落ち着いて説明しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine determiner of the subject noun 'Professor'.
Common noun; head of the nominative subject phrase 'Der Professor'.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present); predicates the action and selects a direct object.
Definite article; accusative feminine determiner of the object noun 'Aufgabe'.
Common noun; head of the accusative direct object 'die Aufgabe'.
Degree adverb; intensifies the manner adverb 'ruhig'.
Adverb of manner; modifies the verb ('erklärt').

sentences.target: Ich frage den Professor nach der Prüfung.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə deːn pʁoˈfɛsoːɐ̯ naːx deːɐ̯ ˈpʁyːfʊŋ./

translations.de: Ich frage den Professor nach der Prüfung.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə deːn pʁoˈfɛsoːɐ̯ naːx deːɐ̯ ˈpʁyːfʊŋ./
translations.en: I ask the professor about the exam.
translations.es: Le pregunto al profesor sobre el examen.
translations.fr: Je pose une question au professeur sur l’examen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我向教授询问考试的事。
translations.pt: Eu pergunto ao professor sobre a prova.
translations.he: אני שואל את הפרופסור על הבחינה.
translations.vi: Tôi hỏi giáo sư về kỳ thi.
translations.nl: Ik vraag de professor naar het examen.
translations.hi: मैं प्रोफेसर से परीक्षा के बारे में पूछता हूँ।
translations.el: Ρωτάω τον καθηγητή για την εξέταση.
translations.id: Saya bertanya kepada dosen tentang ujian.
translations.ro: Îl întreb pe profesor despre examen.
translations.ja: 教授に試験について聞きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (1st person singular, present).
Definite article; accusative masculine determiner of 'Professor' (direct object).
Common noun; head of the accusative direct object 'den Professor'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the prepositional complement of 'fragen' ('nach der Prüfung').
Definite article; dative feminine determiner of 'Prüfung'.
Common noun; head of the prepositional object 'nach der Prüfung'.

sentences.target: Mein Professor gibt morgen eine kurze Vorlesung.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n pʁoˈfɛsoːɐ̯ ɡɪpt ˈmɔʁɡn̩ ˈaɪ̯nə ˈkʊʁtsə ˈfoːɐ̯leːzʊŋ./

translations.de: Mein Professor gibt morgen eine kurze Vorlesung.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n pʁoˈfɛsoːɐ̯ ɡɪpt ˈmɔʁɡn̩ ˈaɪ̯nə ˈkʊʁtsə ˈfoːɐ̯leːzʊŋ./
translations.en: My professor is giving a short lecture tomorrow.
translations.es: Mi profesor dará mañana una charla corta.
translations.fr: Mon professeur donnera une courte conférence demain.
translations.it: Il mio professore terrà domani una breve lezione.
translations.ko: 제 교수님이 내일 짧은 강의를 하세요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的教授明天会做一次简短的讲座。
translations.yue: 我嘅教授聽日會做一場簡短嘅講座。
translations.ru: Мой профессор завтра прочитает короткую лекцию.
translations.pt: Meu professor vai dar uma palestra curta amanhã.
translations.he: הפרופסור שלי יעביר מחר הרצאה קצרה.
translations.tr: Profesörüm yarın kısa bir ders verecek.
translations.vi: Giáo sư của tôi sẽ có một buổi giảng ngắn vào ngày mai.
translations.nl: Mijn professor geeft morgen een kort college.
translations.uk: Мій професор завтра прочитає коротку лекцію.
translations.hu: A professzorom holnap egy rövid előadást tart.
translations.hi: मेरा प्रोफेसर कल एक छोटा लेक्चर देगा।
translations.pl: Mój profesor jutro wygłosi krótki wykład.
translations.el: Ο καθηγητής μου θα δώσει αύριο μια σύντομη διάλεξη.
translations.nb: Professoren min holder en kort forelesning i morgen.
translations.id: Dosen saya akan memberi kuliah singkat besok.
translations.sv: Min professor håller en kort föreläsning i morgon.
translations.ro: Profesorul meu va ține mâine o prelegere scurtă.
translations.cs: Můj profesor zítra bude mít krátkou přednášku.
translations.da: Min professor holder en kort forelæsning i morgen.
translations.ja: 私の教授は明日短い講義をします。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; modifies 'Professor' (1st person singular possessor).
Common noun; head of the nominative subject phrase.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present); takes a direct object.
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb, indicating time.
Indefinite article; accusative feminine determiner of 'Vorlesung'.
Attributive adjective; agrees with 'Vorlesung' (feminine accusative singular); modifies the noun.
Common noun; head of the accusative direct object.

sentences.target: Der Professor kommt zu spät ins Seminar.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ pʁoˈfɛsoːɐ̯ kɔmt tsuː ʃpɛːt ɪns zeːmiˈnaːʁ./

translations.de: Der Professor kommt zu spät ins Seminar.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ pʁoˈfɛsoːɐ̯ kɔmt tsuː ʃpɛːt ɪns zeːmiˈnaːʁ./
translations.en: The professor is late to the seminar.
translations.es: El profesor llega tarde al seminario.
translations.fr: Le professeur arrive en retard au séminaire.
translations.it: Il professore arriva tardi al seminario.
translations.zh-Hans: 教授去参加研讨会迟到了。
translations.pt: O professor chega atrasado ao seminário.
translations.vi: Giáo sư đến muộn buổi hội thảo.
translations.nl: De professor komt te laat naar het seminar.
translations.hu: A professzor késve érkezik a szemináriumra.
translations.hi: प्रोफेसर सेमिनार में देर से पहुँचते हैं।
translations.nb: Professoren kommer for sent til seminaret.
translations.sv: Professorn kommer för sent till seminariet.
translations.da: Professoren kommer for sent til seminaret.
translations.ja: 教授はセミナーに遅れて来ます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine determiner of the subject noun 'Professor'.
Common noun; head of the nominative subject phrase.
Finite intransitive main verb (3rd person singular, present).
Degree adverb; intensifies 'spät' in the fixed expression 'zu spät' ('too late').
Adverb; complements 'kommt' as a predicative time/manner expression.
Preposition; here with accusative indicating direction (originally contracted in the sentence as 'ins' = 'in das'). Introduces the destination PP.
Definite article; accusative neuter determiner of 'Seminar' (part of the expanded contraction 'ins' = 'in das').
Common noun; head of the prepositional phrase indicating destination.
